rulings.Case Title: CHARLES LI VS. THAI MING CHIU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause (Judgment Debtor Tina Yan) Why And Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 2, 2021 line 1. Order To Show Cause (Judgment Debtor Tina Yan) Why And Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue Status Report on Appraisal and Defendant's Substitution of Counsel/Limited Scope. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: MOLLY MOLLIN VS. JEAN A KING ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Oppositions To Defendant Raymond Shelley David Trews Demurrer And Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 2, 2021 line 2. PLAINTIFF MOLLY MOLLIN Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Oppositions To Defendant Raymond Shelley David Trews Demurrer And Motion To Strike is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall file oppositions pursuant to this ruling no later than November 3, 2021; Defendant shall file replies no later than November 7, 2021. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN SHIMAMOTO VS. PAULA OGI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 2, 2021 line 3. DEFENDANT PAULA OGI, PAULA OGI, STACEY SHIMAMOTO, STACEY SHIMAMOTO (INCORRECTLY SUED AS STACY DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT is continued to November 19, 2021 for parties to provide a joint declaration regarding the status of the settlement referenced in parties' previous filings. Joint Statement to be filed no later than November 7, 2021.
